moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Weekend
moments.blurb: The Wimbledon Championships culminate this weekend with the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals at the All England Club.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: The grass court action reaches its peak! Who are you backing to lift the trophies at Wimbledon this weekend?

angles.name: London Focus
angles.copy: All eyes on SW19! London is buzzing for the final days of Wimbledon. Who will be crowned champion?

moments.title: British Grand Prix Race Day
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 British Grand Prix race day takes place on Sunday at the iconic Silverstone Circuit.

angles.name: Race Excitement
angles.copy: Lights out and away we go! It's race day at Silverstone for the British Grand Prix. Who's taking the chequered flag?

angles.name: Local Buzz
angles.copy: The roar of the engines is set to shake Silverstone! British Grand Prix race day is here – who are you rooting for?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Post Malone
moments.blurb: US rapper and singer Post Malone, known for hits like 'Circles' and 'Rockstar', turns 31 today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 31st birthday to the one and only Post Malone! What's your favourite track from him?

angles.name: Music Vibe
angles.copy: Party time! It's Post Malone's birthday today. Drop your go-to Posty anthem in the comments!

moments.title: Happy Birthday John Waite
moments.blurb: British rock singer John Waite, known for The Babys, Bad English, and his solo hit 'Missing You', turns 74 today.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 74th birthday to rock legend John Waite! From The Babys to Bad English and his iconic solo career, what's your favourite John Waite moment?

angles.name: Missing You
angles.copy: 'Missing You' still hits different. Happy Birthday to the incredible John Waite!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: American singer Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, known for 80s hits like 'The Power of Love', turns 76 tomorrow.

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Do you believe in love? It's Huey Lewis's 76th birthday tomorrow! Get ready to celebrate the 80s icon.

angles.name: Power of Love
angles.copy: The heart of rock & roll is still beating strong! Happy early birthday to Huey Lewis, turning 76!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Shane Filan
moments.blurb: Irish singer Shane Filan, best known as a member of Westlife, turns 47 tomorrow.

angles.name: Westlife Love
angles.copy: Flying without wings towards his birthday! Wishing Shane Filan of Westlife a very happy 47th birthday for tomorrow!

angles.name: Pop Nostalgia
angles.copy: Remember all those classic Westlife tunes? It's Shane Filan's birthday tomorrow! What's your favourite Westlife song?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: English musician Ringo Starr, drummer for The Beatles, turns 86 on Sunday.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! The legendary Ringo Starr turns 86 on Sunday. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums?

angles.name: Drummer Icon
angles.copy: An absolute icon of rock history! Happy 86th birthday to Ringo Starr this Sunday.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Kevin Bacon
moments.blurb: Actor and musician Kevin Bacon, known for his film roles and as part of The Bacon Brothers, turns 68 on Monday.

angles.name: Six Degrees
angles.copy: Six degrees of separation leads to a birthday! Happy 68th to the multi-talented Kevin Bacon this Monday.

angles.name: Musical Talent
angles.copy: Beyond the big screen, Kevin Bacon is a seriously talented musician. Celebrate his 68th birthday on Monday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jack White
moments.blurb: US musician Jack White, frontman of The White Stripes and The Raconteurs, turns 51 on Tuesday.

angles.name: Rock Genius
angles.copy: Seven Nation Army couldn't hold back the birthday wishes! Happy 51st to the brilliant Jack White this Tuesday.

angles.name: Indie Icon
angles.copy: From The White Stripes to solo brilliance, Jack White is a true original. Celebrate his birthday on Tuesday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jim Kerr
moments.blurb: Scottish singer Jim Kerr, lead vocalist of Simple Minds, turns 67 on Tuesday.

angles.name: Simple Minds Legend
angles.copy: Don't You (Forget About Him)! Happy 67th birthday to Simple Minds frontman Jim Kerr this Tuesday.

angles.name: Scottish Icon
angles.copy: A true Scottish legend! Wishing Jim Kerr of Simple Minds a very happy birthday this Tuesday.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jessica Simpson
moments.blurb: American singer, actress, and fashion designer Jessica Simpson turns 46 on Wednesday.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: She's still got the style! Happy 46th birthday to the one and only Jessica Simpson this Wednesday.

angles.name: Throwback Hit
angles.copy: Remember 'I Wanna Love You Forever'? Happy birthday to Jessica Simpson for Wednesday!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Richie Sambora
moments.blurb: US guitarist and songwriter Richie Sambora, best known as the former lead guitarist of Bon Jovi, turns 67 on Thursday.

angles.name: Bon Jovi Legend
angles.copy: Woah, we're halfway there! Happy 67th birthday to rock icon Richie Sambora this Thursday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: The guitar riffs wouldn't be the same without him! Celebrate Richie Sambora's birthday on Thursday.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Alessia Cara
moments.blurb: Canadian singer-songwriter Alessia Cara, known for hits like 'Here' and 'Scars to Your Beautiful', turns 30 on Thursday.

angles.name: Pop Star
angles.copy: Turning 30! Happy birthday to the incredibly talented Alessia Cara this Thursday.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: Celebrate Alessia Cara's 30th birthday with us this Thursday! What's your top track from her?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Liz Mitchell
moments.blurb: Jamaican-born British singer Liz Mitchell, lead singer of disco group Boney M., turns 74 on Friday.

angles.name: Disco Queen
angles.copy: Daddy Cool! Happy 74th birthday to the legendary Liz Mitchell of Boney M. this Friday.

angles.name: 70s Icon
angles.copy: Still making us dance! Celebrate Liz Mitchell's birthday on Friday.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Roger McGuinn
moments.blurb: American musician Roger McGuinn, co-founder and frontman of The Byrds, turns 84 on Saturday.

angles.name: Folk Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Turn! Turn! Turn! Happy 84th birthday to the iconic Roger McGuinn of The Byrds this Saturday.

angles.name: Byrds Legend
angles.copy: A true architect of folk-rock. Celebrate Roger McGuinn's birthday this Saturday!

moments.title: Latitude Festival approaches
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, a major UK multi-arts camping festival, takes place from July 23-26 in Henham Park, Suffolk, celebrating its 20th anniversary.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on! Latitude Festival is just around the corner, celebrating 20 years of music, comedy, and arts. Who's heading to Henham Park?

angles.name: Suffolk Buzz
angles.copy: Excitement building in Suffolk! Latitude Festival is nearly here – get ready for an unforgettable weekend in Henham Park.

moments.title: BBC Proms Opening Night
moments.blurb: The world's largest classical music festival, the BBC Proms, begins its 2026 season at the Royal Albert Hall on Friday, July 17.

angles.name: Classical Kick-off
angles.copy: The First Night of the Proms is next week! Get ready for a spectacular season of classical music from the Royal Albert Hall.

angles.name: London Culture
angles.copy: A highlight of London's summer cultural calendar! The BBC Proms begin next Friday. Are you going?
